title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Can you hear that? The race hasn't even
started yet, but the crowd is so loud it feels like
the ground is shaking!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
So this is the Japanese Derby! Now I get how this
is totally different from other races!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: And now I can see it...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I can see exactly how things are gonna go down
after the race.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Easy win, landslide—absolute victory! This year's
Derby champion is El Condor Pasaaa!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, I lost! What kind of training were you doing,
El?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ah, but then again, it makes sense that someone
trying to be the world's strongest racer could be
so fast...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That's right! I've been running completely
different races and training differently from
everyone else.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Of course that path has made me strong!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Let's race again! And again and again and again! I
wanna keep racing you forever!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hehehe... Yup, that's how it'll go, all right...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Today, I gotta show everyone what a really strong
person can do!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Of course not! I'm always a good sport!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
It might be obvious, but today I'm gonna prove to
Spe that the world's strongest racer is also the
strongest in our generation!
